title: Grafana 12.4 — Regex Variable Transforms
description: 12.4 lets you apply a regex to both the variable VALUE and the displayed TEXT. Pick any `handler` below — the dropdown shows the short name but the query uses the full path.

list.name: handler_full
list.label: Handler (full path)
list.description: Captures full path. Displayed short-form via the variable below.

list.name: handler_short
list.label: Handler (display)
list.description: 12.4 regex-text transform — captures only the final path segment for display.

options.content:
### Regex variable transforms (12.4)

- **`handler_full`** — regex `^(?<value>.+)$` keeps the whole path. Used in queries.
- **`handler_short`** — regex `^.*/(?<text>[^/]+)$` captures only the last path segment for display.

Each panel below injects both forms so you can see display-vs-value.
